name: Coconut Jelly Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the cake flour, baking powder, and salt together three times.
2. Cream the shortening until smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar and cream until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and beat until light.
5. Add half a cup of coconut.
6. Alternately add dry ingredients and milk, beating after each addition until smooth.
7. Add vanilla flavoring.
8. Pour batter into well-oiled muffin tins.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 20-25 minutes.
10. Beat the jelly with a fork until it reaches a spreading consistency.
11. When cakes are cool, spread the top and sides with jelly.
12. Roll in one cup of coconut.
Serves: 8
